stemHtml:
The physiological effects of an acceleration of 3G on the human body depends on the:

1. duration of the G forces,
2. onset rate of the G forces,
3. magnitude of the G forces,
4. aircraft’s altitude.

options.b: 1 and 4 are correct, 2 and 3 are incorrect
options.c: 1 and 3 are correct, 2 and 4 are incorrect
